no: Adds Kaya, a merchant NPC with items tailored for Edwin and mage characters. Minimal dialogue — primarily a vendor. Component 1 makes Edwin's Amulet of Power droppable
sum: Adds Kaya, a joinable NPC companion to BG2 and IWDEE, with items tailored for Edwin and mage characters.

new:
This sparkling amulet quickly reveals its remarkable abilities : among others, not only it immunizes against levels drain but also increases too notably the luck and the lore of its bearer; what is more, almost everyone may wear it. It might well be that this artefact had to be enchanted by a priest of Mystra, which it's very likely.

STATISTICS :

Equipped abilities :
Vocalize
Immunity to Levels Drain
Luck
Lore : +20
Weight : 1
Not usable by :
 Wizard Slayer

co.no: Adds Kaya merchant NPC and her store to the game world. Mage-focused items

co.tp2n: Make the Edwin s amulet droppable (pour BG2EE)?
co.no: Makes Edwin's Amulet of Power (MISC89) droppable. Modifies item_use.2da
